title: Quantum computing webinar

description: Title of the event: Quantum Computing WebinarObjective:The objective of this event was to inculcate the importance and the growth of quantum computing over time. BVP Optica organised a Webinar on Quantum Computing and invited Dr. Nagrath, Founder CEO of Qpi Technologies which is at the forefront in India in terms of Quantum Tech.
